dct_description_sm: Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
Bar scales in lower right: "Hispanicae Leucae" and "German Milliar.".
Text on verso titled "Guinee, avec les isles de S. Thomas, du Prince, et d'Anobon," p. 637 and 640.
Map text in Latin. Text on verso in French.
Inset map in lower left : [1] I.S. Thomae
